response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic workflows and real-time systems is promising, though not at the scale or risk profile required for this role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Sociomantic’s low-latency microservices).
Diverse technical leadership in scaling engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, dev-ops at Altom Consulting).
concerns: No explicit executive experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) or fintech infrastructure leadership (credit systems, compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears limited to tooling/frameworks rather than production multi-agent systems with financial stakes.
Lacks demonstrated experience in regulated environments or hybrid engineering governance with external partners.
